faq.question: Does it work for tutoring?
faq.answer: Yes, builder creates sites for both large courses and private tutors.

faq.question: Can I add video?
faq.answer: Yes, you can add YouTube, Vimeo links or upload video.

faq.question: Is there enrollment form?
faq.answer: Yes, enrollment form is created automatically.

faq.question: How much does it cost?
faq.answer: Free plan allows creating a basic website. Paid plans open all features.
